response.global_analysis:
1. Audio Match: The spoken dialogue is 100% manual transcription since no vocal music or pre-existing lyrics are present. 
2. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly matched to Ninomae Ina'nis's vocal outbursts. We've captured her farming gameplay, short singing hums ('Farmer's life for me'), chicken interactions, and her preparing to eat noodles.
3. On-Screen Text Exception: From 04:19.000 to 04:59.000, she mutes her microphone to eat. A visual subtitle has been added to display the prominent on-screen text ('INA MUTED EATING RQ TY') for the duration of the mute.

subtitles.original: Okay, after I... I harvest and plant everything,
subtitles.english: Okay, after I... I harvest and plant everything,

subtitles.original: I shall... I shall eat my noodles.
subtitles.english: I shall... I shall eat my noodles.

subtitles.original: Actually, I should pour the water while...
subtitles.english: Actually, I should pour the water while...

subtitles.original: It cooks, and then I can harvest, and then I can eat, and then I can harvest. Yeah.
subtitles.english: It cooks, and then I can harvest, and then I can eat, and then I can harvest. Yeah.

subtitles.original: All right, three minutes, guys, three minutes.
subtitles.english: All right, three minutes, guys, three minutes.

subtitles.original: Or my noodles are gonna be noodles without soup.
subtitles.english: Or my noodles are gonna be noodles without soup.

subtitles.original: Maybe I should go do some of the minigames too.
subtitles.english: Maybe I should go do some of the minigames too.

subtitles.original: But I can totally fill the rest of my inventory with...
subtitles.english: But I can totally fill the rest of my inventory with...

subtitles.original: I feel like the closer I am, the more eggs they lay.
subtitles.english: I feel like the closer I am, the more eggs they lay.

subtitles.original: All right, we good? We good?
subtitles.english: All right, we good? We good?

subtitles.original: Nice. We almost have two full stacks.
subtitles.english: Nice. We almost have two full stacks.

subtitles.original: Are the noodles really done? Okay, I'll... I will eat here.
subtitles.english: Are the noodles really done? Okay, I'll... I will eat here.

subtitles.original: Ina muted eating real quick, thank you.
subtitles.english: Ina muted eating real quick, thank you.

subtitles.original: [On-Screen Text: INA MUTED EATING RQ TY]
subtitles.english: [On-Screen Text: INA MUTED EATING RQ TY]
